# 524Tracker

> 524Tracker is the only free web tool that tracks all major bank credit card application rules in one place — including Chase 5/24, Amex once-per-lifetime bonus eligibility, Citi 8/65, and Bank of America 2/3/4. No account required. All data stays in your browser.

## Main Tools
- [5/24 & Bank Rules Tracker](https://524tracker.com/): Track Chase 5/24 status, Amex lifetime bonuses, Citi 8/65, BoA 2/3/4, Capital One, and more
- [Rules Guide](https://524tracker.com/rules-guide): Complete explanation of all major bank credit card application rules with examples
- [Top Cards](https://524tracker.com/top-cards): Best credit cards to apply for, optimized for points maximizers
- [Card Value Calculator](https://524tracker.com/card-value-calculator): Calculate whether a credit card is worth keeping by comparing annual fee vs benefits received
- [Best Cards by Category](https://524tracker.com/best-cards-by-category): Find the top 3 credit cards for any spending category — gas, groceries, dining, travel, and more

## Blog
- [Blog](https://524tracker.com/blog): Expert guides on credit card application rules, churning strategies, and bank-specific restrictions
- [Chase 5/24 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/chase-5-24-rule-explained): Everything you need to know about Chase's 5/24 rule — what counts, what doesn't, and how to check your status
- [Amex Lifetime Bonus Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/amex-lifetime-bonus-rule-explained): The Amex lifetime rule means you can only earn a welcome bonus on each card once per lifetime — which cards are affected and how to check eligibility
- [Citi 8/65 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/citi-8-65-rule-explained): The Citi 8/65 rule limits you to 1 Citi card every 8 days and 2 every 65 days — how to time applications correctly
- [Bank of America 2/3/4 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/bank-of-america-2-3-4-rule-explained): BoA limits approvals to 2 in 30 days, 3 in 12 months, and 4 in 24 months — how all three windows work together
- [How to Check Your Chase 5/24 Status](https://524tracker.com/blog/how-to-check-5-24-status): Check your 5/24 count for free without a hard inquiry using three methods that work in 2026

## About
- [About Us](https://524tracker.com/about): Who we are and editorial policy
- [Privacy Policy](https://524tracker.com/privacy): How we handle data (spoiler: tracker data never leaves your browser)

## Reference
- [FAQ](https://524tracker.com/faq): 20 most common churning questions answered
- [Contact](https://524tracker.com/contact): Rule corrections and feedback
